content.en:
There is only one entrance to the Qinglian Giant City, and to enter the Qinglian Giant City, you need to pay ten boundary river coins, and you can stay in the Qinglian Giant City for 100,000 boundary river years.

In the Boundary River, the passage of time is not the same as the Eternal Realm.

The 100,000 Realm River Year is not a very long time, but if you spend 100,000 Realm River years in the Boundary River, 100,000 Eternal Epochs will be passed in the Void Region, so the 100,000 Realm River Year is also a very long time.

It only costs 100,000 Realm River Coins, so it's still worth it.

However, this is only the cost of entering the city, and if you want to buy a property or spend money, you will have to spend a lot of Jiehe coins.

It is conceivable how many Boundary River coins you have to earn to build a Boundary River Giant City, but without strong strength, you are not qualified to build a giant city at all.

That is, only the strongest among the eternal masters has the strength to bless a large number of peak Legendary Realm Lords in a giant city in the Boundary River.

At present, Ye Tian does not have the strength to build a giant city, so he can only envy it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian paid ten boundary river coins and entered the Qinglian Giant City from 19.

Although he is in the same void area as the Qinglian master, he still has to pay a fee to enter the Qinglian Giant City, and there is no preferential treatment in this regard.

Unless he is the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the Qinglian Holy Land, he may have special treatment.

After entering the Qinglian Giant City, Ye Tian immediately contacted the white-bearded old man.

Soon, the white-bearded old man arrived.

"Endless Lord, let's go, go to my courtyard and sit down. "

The white-bearded old man said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian followed the white-bearded old man to a courtyard, the area is not small, in the Qinglian Giant City, where every inch of land is golden, there is such a small courtyard, but it is not easy.

The white-bearded old man said: "Endless Lord, in Qinglian Giant City or other giant cities, space is imprisoned, so if you want to open up space here, or use the space artifact to turn into a house, you can't do it, so if you want to live here, you must buy real estate." In the future, you can also buy a property and live here as a place to live. "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, the white-bearded old man briefly introduced the situation of Qinglian Giant City to Ye Tian.

Qinglian Giant City is very prosperous, and there are about millions of peak Legendary Realm lords here.

When he heard this number, Ye Tian was quite surprised.

Although, when he came in, he used the copying talent to probe, but some people were in the building, isolating the exploration of the copying talent, because the number of his probes was not too much.

Now, when he learned that there were millions of peak legends here, he was naturally extremely shocked.

The peak Legendary Realm Lord of the Void Region can't even compare to a fraction of what is here, it's too much worse.

"Old man with white beard, there are not too many peak Legendary Realm lords in an eternal realm, how can there be so many peak Legendary Realm lords in the Qinglian Giant City established by the Blue Lotus Controller?" Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

That's an abnormal amount!

The white-bearded old man explained with a smile: "The resources of the Eternal Realm are limited, and there are very few treasure lands, so it is naturally difficult to give birth to so many Peak Legendary Realm Lords, but the resources in the Boundary River are very difficult, so it is not difficult to cultivate Peak Legendary Realm Lords." After many peak legendary realm lords came out of the eternal realm, after giving birth to heirs, the heirs were not suitable to return to the eternal realm to cultivate, and would stay in the boundary river, and the endless years went on, multiplying from generation to generation, and naturally gave birth to many boundary river lifeforms, and it was naturally not difficult for these boundary river life beings to cultivate to the peak legendary realm in such an environment as the boundary river, and many peak legendary realm lords in the Qinglian Giant City were the lives in the boundary river. "

"In that case, with so many peak Legendary Realm Lords, wouldn't it be easy to give birth to many Eternal Masters?" Ye Tian said.

The white-bearded old man shook his head, "No, it is very difficult for the life of the Boundary River to become the Eternal Master, and the difficulty is at least tens of thousands of times more difficult than the life in the Eternal Realm. Most of the Eternal Masters in the Realm River today are beings who have come out of the Eternal Tribulation Domain. In the Boundary River, even a fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord could not get the attention and favor of an eternal master. However, if a fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord who came out of the Eternal Realm, he was qualified to receive the attention and attention of the Eternal Controller. "

Although this is a bit unfair to the Boundary River Realm, the Boundary River Life itself has a superior cultivation environment, and it is easy to become a Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and only a few of the endless beings in the Eternal Realm have become Peak Legendary Realm Lords.

Being able to become a peak Legendary Realm Lord in the Eternal Realm is itself an incomparably demonic existence, so it is normal to be able to have a greater hope of becoming an Eternal Master.

However, even for beings in the Eternal Realm, it is still extremely difficult to become the Eternal Master.

Ye Tian chatted with the white-bearded old man for a long time, drinking tea and talking for a long time.

After that, Ye Tian left the residence of the white-bearded old man, ready to buy a courtyard, for a long time in the future, he was afraid that he would have to practice here, as for breaking through the boundary river, let another copy body do it, leaving a copy body in the Qinglian Giant City, it is naturally a better choice.

In this way, even if the replica body of the wandering man falls, he can reunite.

But after Ye Tian asked around, he was surprised by the price of the courtyard in Qinglian Giant City, and the most ordinary courtyard required at least tens of thousands of realm river coins.

717 So, Ye Tian sold a lot of resources and treasures, and only then did he gather tens of thousands of realm river coins, buy a relatively ordinary courtyard, and temporarily live in Qinglian Giant City.

This time, Ye Tian's first purpose was not to cultivate, but to copy a talent.

And in the boundary river, there are some powerful rare creatures with control-level ancestral endowments, and if they are copied in their hands, they will make a lot of money.

So, he next specifically inquired about the powerful creatures in the Boundary River.

And soon, he gathered some information.

For example, there is a kind of Turtle Lazy Beast in the Boundary River, this Turtle Lazy Beast is extremely large, and its defense power far exceeds that of the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the fifth level, even if the Eternal Master wants to kill a Turtle Lazy Beast, it will be a little troublesome.

However, some Eternal Masters like to capture the Tortoise Lath, subdue them, and then build a giant city on their backs, which will occasionally carry the giant city on its back and swim in the boundary river.

Of course, the tortoise lazy beast spends most of its time sleeping.

According to Ye Tian's guess, the Xuan Turtle Lazy Beast definitely has a control-level ancestral endowment.

And in a place not too far from Qinglian Giant City, there is a giant city, called Tianzhu Giant City, which is supported by a Xuan Turtle Lazy Beast.

As a result, Ye Tian immediately condensed a copy body, left the Blue Lotus Giant City, and rushed to the Heavenly Pillar Giant City. _
